form.formComment: Drawn the inside alley. At the last start finished 5th in a P5 on March 29 over 520m at this track behind Federal Blonde beaten 8 lengths (30.95). Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.99) when sixth over 300m at Taree Super Track in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from seven starts. Has ability and looks a key chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted wide and came together rounding the turn out of the front straight.

form.formComment: Placed last time (30.48) at this track in a Mix 5, finishing third and beaten 2.25 lengths. Has three successes and four minors from 10 starts from box 3. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 520m. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by 2.75 lengths at Rockhampton (23.73) beating Swerve in a Mix 5 on March 25. Risky starter, racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 2.25 lengths in 30.24, beating He's Something. Last start finished 6th over 520m at this track beaten 9 lengths (30.98) behind He's Something in a Mix 5 on March 29. Hard to entertain this time.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a slick early split and led until late but gathered in when a 1.75 lengths fifth at this track over 520m in 30.39. Safe beginner who should take catching despite the draw.
